text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "Recommendations: Rx/ Cilodex ear drops administer 3-4 drops in the right ear morning and evening for 7 days Rx/ Fonitis ear spray administer 2 sprays in the right ear morning and evening for the next 7 days - do not let water enter the right ear and do not wear the right prosthesis for 7 days", 0.0, 0.5)
